name: Search in rotated sorted array-II
statement: Given an integer array nums, sorted in ascending order (may contain duplicate values) and a target value k. Now the array is rotated at some pivot point unknown to you. Return True if k is present and otherwise, return False.
constraints:
•   1 <= nums.length <= 104
  •   -104 <= nums[i] <= 104
  •   nums is guaranteed to be rotated at some pivot.
  •   -104 <= k <= 104

examples.explanation: The element 3 is present in the array. So, the answer is True.
The element 10 is not present in the array. So, the answer is False.
